action.reasoning: Observation: Best eval AUC 0.7611. Val AUC 0.7645. Analysis: Gap suggests slight overfitting to val. Need better generalization. Decision: Try (1) larger model with SWA, (2) GRU variant, (3) ensemble of top models. Also try label smoothing and different dropout patterns.
